home.titlePre: Torah, a profession and the Land of Israel —
home.lead: A universal school for young men from the CIS: the teachings of the Lubavitcher Rebbe, a profession, Hebrew and integration under experienced mentors.
home.heroFloatValue: We help young men start a new life in the Land of Israel
home.rebbeTitle: The teachings of the Lubavitcher Rebbe
home.rebbeQuote: “Every Jew is an emissary of the Almighty. Every place where he stands is a place of Torah.”
home.rebbeText: The program is built on the teachings of Rabbi Menachem Mendel Schneerson. Chassidut, the Rebbe's sichot and his approach to people are what we pass on to our students every day.
home.missionTitle: Genuinely new — that which is, at once
home.missionP1: After the events of 2022, many young men aged 16–17 from the CIS found themselves without the language, a profession, sometimes without a diploma. They needed a universal school that did not exist in Israel.
home.missionP2: We became that place. Here Torah is inseparable from the practice of life in the Land of Israel — from Hebrew to a profession, from Chassidut to real integration into society.
home.pillar1Desc: Talmud, Halacha, Chassidut and the Rebbe's sichot with experienced mentors.
home.pillar2Desc: Alongside study — applied courses and preparation for work.
home.pillar3Desc: Language and integration into life in the Land of Israel.
home.pillar4Desc: A blend of Torah depth and practical experience.
home.studyCtaDesc: 15+ blocks, 5 disciplines, 9 weekly classes with different teachers.
home.mentorsSubtitle: Mentors with real experience of life in Israel
home.quoteText: “Here I found both Torah and a profession. And true friends.”
home.donateBannerTitle: Every donation is concrete hours of Torah and student support
home.donateBannerDesc: Students need study materials, food, housing and mentorship. All of it rests on donors.

team.title: Experienced mentors with deep experience of life in the Land of Israel
team.desc: Each teacher combines the academic depth of Torah with practical experience of life in Israel and work in a secular profession.

students.title: Stories of those who study with us
students.desc: Some prepare for semicha, others learn a profession in parallel. One thing unites them — Torah and the Land of Israel.
students.ach1D: Actively studying at the yeshiva today
students.empty: Student stories will appear here soon.

study.title: How study works at the yeshiva
study.desc: A balanced day, a thoughtful program and a clear schedule.
study.dailyDesc: The structure of the study day: prayer, study, meals, sport.
study.curriculumDesc: Five Torah disciplines — from text to commentaries.
study.scheduleDesc: When and where each class takes place.
study.principlesTitle: How we differ from other yeshivas
study.principle1D: Alongside Torah study — gaining a relevant profession for life in the Land of Israel.
study.principle2D: Learning Hebrew and social integration under experienced mentors.
study.principle3D: Small groups, a personal approach, shared meals and genuine relationships between students and mentors.
study.principle4D: Professionals across many fields with deep experience of life in the Land of Israel.

daily.title: Every day — structure, rhythm and balance
daily.desc: Study, prayer, shared meals, sport and personal time.

curriculum.title: Five disciplines — one system
curriculum.desc: Each subject is led by an experienced mentor. From plain text to the commentaries of Rishonim and Acharonim.
curriculum.empty: The curriculum will appear here soon.

schedule.title: When and where each class takes place
schedule.desc: The full weekly schedule of classes at the yeshiva.
schedule.empty: No classes match the selected filters

contacts.title: Get in touch
contacts.desc: Tkoa, Gush Etzion — about 25 km from Jerusalem.
contacts.formThanksDesc: Your message has been sent. We will get in touch with you.

donate.desc: Your donation helps students combine Torah, a profession and life in the Land of Israel.
donate.campaignGoal: Goal — to fund a full year of study
donate.thanksDesc: Payment is processed via Israel Toremet (IsraelGives).
donate.thanksShowMe: Show me in the donors list
donate.thanksReceipt: A tax-deductible receipt will be emailed to you by Israel Toremet.

footer.about: A school in the village of Tkoa (Gush Etzion, Israel). Torah and Chassidut, a profession, Hebrew and integration.
